programmes.show_name: Indie Forever Club night at the 6 Music Festival
programmes.show_description: 6 Music royalty, Steve Lamacq, with an iconic Indie DJ set live at Yes in Manchester for 6 Music Festival 2026.

programmes.show_name: Indie Forever Club night at the 6 Music Festival
programmes.show_description: Nick Grimshaw and Beth Ditto have an unmissable B2B Indie DJ set live at Yes in Manchester.

programmes.show_name: Indie Forever Club night at the 6 Music Festival
programmes.show_description: 6 Music's very own Nathan Shepherd and Emily Pilbeam bring the energy with a live at Yes in Manchester.
Rave Forever celebrates Spring Equinox with a show full of sunrise and sunset mixes. House grooves and a sprinkling of jungle from Tom VR, Fallout, Nia Archives and more!
Clear your mind from distractions with this two-hour mixtape of immersive ambient tracks, including music from Hinako Omori, Dylan Henner and Shida Shahabi.
Shake off the week's stress. Afrodeutsche creates the ultimate chilled-out vibe with the perfect tracks to kick off your Saturday.
Mark Radcliffe and Stuart Maconie present a 6 Music Festival special with live performance highlights plus guest interviews with singer-songwriters Jacob Alon and Naima Bock.
Deb and Craig take over broadcasting duties for a 6 Music Festival flavoured show, with guests Lynks and Courtney Barnett.
Zakia presents a special 6 Music Festival-themed show.
6 Music Festival: Lauren Auder and Tiberius b chat to Cerys and Huw ahead of their live performances later this evening.
Nick and Beth are live from Band on the Wall to bring listeners festival performances from Jacob Alon (performing at Band on the Wall) and Tiberius b (performing at YES).
Afrodeutsche and Amy Lamé are live from Salford for the 6 Music Festival ahead of Courntey Barnett's live set.
2/10. Live from the 6 Music Festival.
Afrodeutsche and Amy Lamé are live from Salford for the 6 Music Festival.
Amy Lamé is live from Salford for the 6 Music Festival with Lynks' set at YES.
Amy Lamé rounds out Saturday night, presenting 2 hours of Swedish DJ Olof Dreijer's set live from Homobloc.
(Some of) the best tracks to have soundtracked dance floors over the last 25 years!
Welcome the new season with this relaxing two-hour spring-themed mix.  Featuring music from Talk Talk, Air, Nina Simone and more.
Let AFRODEUTSCHE provide the perfect soundtrack for that first cup of coffee with music from Sunday Service Chior, Rozi Plain, Dennis Bovell and Mitski.
Mark and Stuart present a feast of great music and chat, including highlights from this year's 6 Music Festival. With music from Yard Act, Courntey Barnett and Lynks.
Cerys complements the festival by looking at the city's canals with Dr Keith Hendry and the rise of climbing with James Lister from The Climbing Depot.
Guy looks back at the Manchester music scene of the late 90s and early 2000s, which revolved around the chippy-turned-music venue the Night and Day Cafe.
Iggy serves up his last sonic cocktail of 2026 including loads of show favourites. Expect key cuts by the likes of Sleaford Mods, Mediaeval Baebes, Albert Ayler, Miles and more.
With a borderless spectrum of music, new experiments in storytelling and sound.
As the 6 Music Festival returns to Manchester, Stuart looks at the more experimental side of its music scene.
Zakia selects her favourite songs from film soundtracks to honour her special guests CJ Mirra and Duval Timothy, composers of the soundtrack for the film My Father's Shadow.
